subject: Weekly Compliance Team Meeting
body:
Dear Team,

Just a quick reminder about our weekly team meeting scheduled for tomorrow at 10 A.M. We will be discussing our current projects and any new updates or issues. Please prepare your weekly reports and forward them to me before the meeting. 

Best,
Rachel Kim

subject: Customer Feedback on Model X
body:
Rachel,

I've received some feedback from customers regarding the Model X. They have been expressing concerns about the charging system. I think it's something we should look into. 

Best,
David Johnson

subject: New Training Program
body:
Dear Team,

I'm excited to inform you about a new training program that we will be starting next month. The program will cover the latest developments in the automotive industry and their implications for our company. More details to follow in the coming weeks. 

Best,
Linda Garcia

subject: Quarterly Performance Review
body:
Rachel,

I've completed the quarterly performance review for our department. I would like to schedule a meeting next week to discuss the results and set goals for the next quarter. 

Best,
Michael Brown

subject: Supply Chain Investment Credits - Canada's ZEV Mandate
body:
Hi David,

I hope this email finds you well. As you may be aware, Canada has recently revised their Zero Emission Vehicle (ZEV) mandate. It appears that this new mandate will significantly affect our supply chain investment credits.

In order to ensure we are fully compliant and able to verify and record these credits, we need to update our documentation framework. Could you please provide some insights into the number of OTA updates we delivered per vehicle in 2025? This information will help us paint a clearer picture of our post-sale software support and may aid in our compliance credit administration.

Thanks in advance,
Rachel

subject: Re: Supply Chain Investment Credits - Canada's ZEV Mandate
body:
Hello Rachel,

Thanks for reaching out. In 2025, each Elexion vehicle received an average of 6 OTA updates. This number reflects our commitment to post-sale software support and I agree, it should be considered in our compliance credit administration under the revised ZEV mandate.

Let me know if you need any further information.

Best,
David

subject: Re: Supply Chain Investment Credits - Canada's ZEV Mandate
body:
David,

Thank you for the quick response. The number of OTA updates certainly provides a good measure of our post-sale software support. This will be a key factor in our updated compliance documentation framework.

I'll keep you updated on the progress.

Best,
Rachel
